markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Talal to Checkthat's strategy, status, and immediate priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Immediate Priority:** Migrate all client prompts to Checkthat.ai. This is critical to start collecting proprietary data now, as historical data cannot be imported from other tools (e.g., Scrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Prioritize "Evaluation" and "Comparison" prompts. These stages yield brand mentions, which are essential for building Checkthat's SEO moat and becoming a traffic broker.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [**Methodology:** Use Talal's "digital twin" prompt generation method to standardize quality and ensure consistency across teams.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Rollout Plan:** Validate Checkthat with key clients (e.g., Augment Code, Lovable) before a public launch. This de-risks the transition by preventing service disruptions if partners like Scrunch react negatively.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

## Topics

### Checkthat's Strategic Vision

  - [**Problem:** The AEO market conflates AI-driven behavior change with simple analytics tools.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Solution:** Checkthat separates these. It standardizes AEO research by building a shared, curated index of B2B software categories and questions.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Moat:** The index creates a massive SEO surface area (brand pages, answer pages) to capture organic traffic, avoiding expensive clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [**Long-Term Goal:** Become the "judge" of AI answers by analyzing historical data for accuracy, comprehensiveness, and source quality. This creates a powerful incentive for brands to be cited by Checkthat.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Prompt Strategy & Methodology

  - [**Problem:** Inconsistent prompt generation across teams creates fragmented data.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [**Solution:** Standardize on Talal's "digital twin" method.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [Create a persona's digital twin using context artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [Ask the twin questions across features to find authentic search language.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Funnel Focus:** Prioritize "Evaluation" and "Comparison" prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These stages generate brand mentions, which are the primary ROI for daily tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
      - [**Deprioritized:** "Awareness" and "Post-Purchase" prompts offer low ROI for daily tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)

### Implementation & Rollout Plan

  - [**Urgency:** Prompt migration is the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [**Why:** Every day without data collection is a permanent loss. Historical data cannot be imported from other tools.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [**Rollout Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
    1.  [**Migrate Prompts:** Move all existing client prompts into Checkthat workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
    2.  [**Validate:** Test with key clients (Augment Code, Lovable) to find and fix bugs.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
    3.  **Launch:** Go public only after the platform is stable.
          - [**Why:** A public launch could trigger partners (e.g., Scrunch) to cut off access, disrupting client service.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [**Platform Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Cost:** \~$0.06/probe. A full index (1.5k categories, 100 prompts/day) would cost \~$200k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Optimization:** Reduce costs to \~$0.03/probe and schedule less critical prompts weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Known Issue:** Answer pages are not yet indexed by search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
      - [Get a list of high-profile clients from Jason/Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
      - [Create Checkthat workspaces for those clients.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
      - [Migrate all existing prompts using the "digital twin" method.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [Document the prompt generation methodology.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [Create a process for submitting bug tickets in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [Investigate why some custom prompts are not running.](https://fathom.video/share/q7G_cbg7PuvpaC-Ctnqu-ssun-dpsTsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
